title: Container for producing a beverage capsule and capsule thereof
abstract: Container (3) for producing of a beverage capsule containing a beverage ingredient, consisting of a formed laminated structure comprising a cup portion (3) with a depth-to-width ratio of at least 0.3 and a peripheral flange (4); said laminated structure comprising an aluminium foil (9) as a middle layer and comprising on the inner side of the aluminium foil (9) a sealing layer (10, 16); wherein the laminated structure further comprises at least one outer polymer film (13) laminated on the outer side of the aluminium foil (9) using a laminating adhesive layer (15) and in that the outer polymer film (13) is printed at its inner surface and is made of semi-crystalline polymer.
claims: Claims Claims: 1 . Container (3) for producing of a beverage capsule containing a beverage ingredient, consisting of a formed laminated structure comprising a cup portion (3) with a depth-to-width ratio of at least 0.3 and a peripheral flange (4) ; said laminated structure comprising an aluminium foil (9) as a middle layer and comprising on the inner side of the aluminium foil (9) a sealing layer (10, 1 6); characterized in that the laminated structure further comprises at least one outer polymer film (13) laminated on the outer side of the aluminium foil (9) using a laminating adhesive layer (15) and in that the outer polymer film (13) is printed at its inner surface and is made of semi-crystalline polymer. 2. Container according to claim 1 , wherein the outer polymer film (1 3) is made of semi- crystalline polymer having a degree of crystallization between 20 and 70%, preferably between 20 and 40%, and having a Young's modulus of 2000 MPa to 2700 MPa, preferably between 2100 MPa and 2300 MPa. 3. Container according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the outer polymer film (13) comprises or consists of semi-crystalline polyethylene terephthalate (PET), polyamide (PA) or polypropylene (PP) or combinations thereof. 4. Container according to claim 3, wherein the outer polymer film (13) comprises or consists of non-oriented cast PET, non-oriented PA, non-oriented PP, non- oriented PA-EVOH, PP-EVOH or combinations thereof. 5. Container according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the outer polymer film (13) has a stress at break of between 40 and 55 MPa. 6. Container according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the outer polymer film (13) has mean thickness of 10 to 50 Î¼Î·Ï, preferably of 15 to 30 Î¼Î·Î¹. 7. Container according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the outer polymer film (13) comprises an ink layer (12) printed on the inner surface such as by rotogravure or digital printing. 8. Container according to claim 7, wherein the ink layer (12) is formed of ink dots having a preferred dot size of 20 to 80 Î¼Î·Ï, preferably 20 to 60 Î¼Î·Î¹. 9. Container according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the aluminium foil (9) is a soft annealed aluminum foil made of AA801 1 A alloy having a mean thickness of 50 to 250 microns, preferably 80 to 120 microns. 10. Container according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the inner sealing layer consists of a heat seal lacquer (1 6) having a mass per square meter of 5 to 15 g/m 2 , preferably 8 to 12 g/m 2 . 1 1 . Container according to any of the preceding claims 1 to 9, wherein the sealing inner layer consists of a polypropylene (PP) film (10) glued to the aluminium foil (9) by an intermediate laminating adhesive layer (14). 12. Container according to claim 1 1 , wherein the polypropylene (PP) film has a thickness of 25 Î¼Î·Î¹ to 35 Î¼Î·Ï, preferably 28 Î¼Î·Î¹ to 32 Î¼Î·Î¹. 13. Container according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the laminating adhesive layer (15) has a mass per square meter of 3 g/m 2 to 8 g/m 2 , preferably 4.5 g/m 2 to 6 g/m 2 . 14. Capsule for the preparation of a beverage in a beverage production device comprising a container (1 ) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the container contains a beverage substance (7) and wherein the container is closed by a closing foil (5) which is sealed onto the peripheral flange (4) of the container. 15. Method for producing a container (1 ) for the production of a beverage capsule, according to any one of claims 1 to 14, wherein it comprises the steps of: - providing a deep-drawable packaging film comprising: - an aluminium foil (9) as a middle layer, - a sealing layer (10, 1 6) on the inner side of the aluminium foil (9), ^at least one outer polymer film (13) laminated on the outer side of the aluminium foil (9) using a laminating adhesive layer (15), wherein the outer polymer film (13) is printed at its inner surface and is made of semi-crystalline polymer and, - forming the deep-drawable packaging film to a cup portion (3) with a depth-to- width ratio of at least 0.3 and forming it with a peripheral flange (4).. 1 6. Method according to claim 1 5, wherein the deep-drawable packaging film is provided with an outer polymer film (1 1 ) which is semi-crystalline and has a degree of crystallization between 20 and 70%, respectively preferably between 20 and 40%, and having Young's modulus of 2000 MPa to 2700 MPa, respectively preferably between 2100 and 2300 MPa. 17. Method according to claims 15 or 1 6, wherein the packaging film is provided with a stress at break of 40 and 55 MPa.
